titleStmt.title: SII 26.679: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 679. (A.R. No. 634 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Uḍaiyār Śrī-Rājēndradēva II: Year 7, Mēsha (Chittirai) (paksha not mentioned) 2, Friday, Kārttigai = 1059 A.D., April 16. The paksha was śukla.

summary.p: This inscription is built at the beginning and is incomplete. It contains the last part of the praśasti of the king.

It states that the Peruṁguṟi Mahāsabhai of Pāvaikkuḍi, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, assembled in the temple of Madurāntaki Īśvaramuḍaiyār and decided, after receiving a sum of 165 kāśu from the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiyār of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in the same nāḍu to give as tax-free gift some land in the village, to provide for the worship and offerings to the image called Amaragaḷnāyakam, of the god Umāskandar.
Śōḻakēraḷaṉ-vāyakkāl, Madurāntaka-vadi, Śrī-Rājēndraśōḻa-vāykkāl and Pūṅguḍi-vāykkāl are mentioned in the description of the boundaries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: raiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum kaikkoṇṭu vijaiya Abhi- ṣekam paṇṇi virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaru(ḷ)ḷiṉa kopparakecariy panmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmateyam pāvaikkuṭip peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum divitikaiyum peṟṟa kāttikai nānṟu śrīmaturān=taki Īśvaramuṭaiyār śrīkoyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu Innāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattu tirunallamuṭaiyār śrīkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum Umāskan=tam tirumeni Amarakaḷnāyakarkku tirucennaṭai tiruviḷa lil ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvaṉa śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟkku śrīcoḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakkum Umāskan=tam tirumeni Amarakaḷnāyakarkku veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku pāvaikkuṭi peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Innilam cantirātittaval lla ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟkku śrīcoḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakkum 4 Āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Innilam nālumā mukkāṇikkiḻ mukkāle Oru māvukkum kiḻpāṟkellai śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟkkum tenpārkellai śrīrājentracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkellai kamutuvaṉ karumāṇikkan comanum tampimārum nilattukkum tirumeṟkkoyil tevar nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai pūṅkuṭi vāykkālukku teṟkkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷum ma ṭṭa nilam Onpatu mākkāṇikkiḻ Araiye muntirikai le Oru māvum Āka taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam Araiye nālu mā muntirikaikkiḻ Onpatu māvālum pātāttālum maṭakkuvan=ta Innilam mākāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle Ira Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraikkum māttāṟk kācu 100 2 10 Āka Innilattāl van=ta kācu 100 6 10 5 Ikkācu nūṟṟarupattañcum Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattu sabhaiyom koṇṭu Innilam Araiye nālu mā muntirikaikkiḻ Onpatu māvum Ittevarkku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom tirunallamuṭaiyār koyilil Eḻun=taruḷi Irukkum tirucennaṭai tiruviḷakkeṇṇaik kuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivan=taṅkaḷukku Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ kācu koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilaBuilt in.
Digital edition of SII 26.679 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
